case_title: GLENN L HICKERSON VS. PRADO GROUP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HICKERSON, GLENN L AS TO DEFENDANT PRADO GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2013 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HICKERSON, GLENN L IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PRADO GROUP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CRAIG GREENWOOD--MEMBER OF LLC; MARK BONN--BROKER IN TRANSACTION; PAN SAFIER--MEMBER OF LLC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
